selection_basis.ledger_reason: Parent batch was the strongest next refined-fuel physics-overlay reduction on the controller action board.
selection_basis.bounded_goal: Reduce the physics rosetta parent into controller-facing fences for non-binding physics overlays, explicit namespace discipline, anti-ranking quantity handling, anti-time/geometry/dynamics imports, and anti-validation or anti-thermodynamic escalation.

deferred_alternatives.reason: Next refined-fuel follow-on after the physics overlay boundary is now reduced.
Strongest current sims follow-on still sitting in the immediate reduction tranche.

raw_source_reread_reason: The parent already isolates the physics-overlay governance boundary tightly enough for a bounded controller-facing reduction.

candidate_items.name: PHYSICS_OVERLAYS_STAY_EXPLICIT_REMOVABLE_AND_NON_BINDING
candidate_items.why_candidate: Preserves the parent's core rule that physics overlays are optional annotations only and cannot modify kernel law.

candidate_items.name: PHYSICS_NAMESPACE_AND_MAPPING_DISCIPLINE_BLOCKS_RETOKENIZATION
candidate_items.why_candidate: Keeps physics analogies explicit and prevents them from hardening into kernel identity or semantic-completion claims.

candidate_items.name: SCALAR_AND_QUANTITY_LANGUAGE_CANNOT_BECOME_RANKING_OR_SELECTION_LAW
candidate_items.why_candidate: Preserves the parent's direct guard against quantity vocabulary turning into hidden preference doctrine.

candidate_items.name: PATH_LOCALITY_AND_TRANSPORT_OVERLAYS_DO_NOT_IMPORT_TIME_GEOMETRY_OR_DYNAMICS
candidate_items.why_candidate: Turns the parent's anti-time, anti-geometry, and anti-dynamics defaults into a controller fence.

candidate_items.name: OBSTRUCTION_ENGINE_AND_VALIDATION_LANGUAGE_STAYS_HYPOTHESIS_ONLY_AND_VERSIONED
candidate_items.why_candidate: Compresses the parent's anti-spacetime, anti-thermodynamic, and anti-validation close into a controller-facing fence.

quarantined_items.name: PHYSICS_LANGUAGE_AS_KERNEL_TRUTH_OR_SEMANTIC_AUTHORITY
quarantined_items.why_quarantined: The parent allows the vocabulary while denying default semantic force, so truth and kernel-authority overread must stay quarantined.

quarantined_items.name: PHYSICS_OVERLAYS_AS_HIDDEN_DYNAMICS_GEOMETRY_OR_EMPIRICAL_VALIDATION_MACHINE
quarantined_items.why_quarantined: The parent is valuable precisely because it blocks physics language from becoming hidden dynamics, geometry, thermodynamic, or validation authority.

notes: This batch was produced as the twenty-second controller-facing A2-mid reduction in this audit thread.
No raw source reread and no active A2 append-save were performed.
